title: dactylorhiza sambucina subsp. insularis
intro: Dactylorhiza sambucina subsp. insularis is a subspecies of orchid, commonly known as the Island Marsh Orchid, which is a terrestrial orchid native to the Mediterranean region. The medicinal properties of Dactylorhiza sambucina subsp. insularis include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce swelling and alleviate respiratory problems, making it a potential treatment for conditions such as bronchitis and asthma. Dactylorhiza sambucina subsp. insularis can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in various forms.
